title: みんなでトップウマドルPJ（エンディング）_ショートエピソード

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm so glad I finally found you!<n>There's
something I reeeally want to tell<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you so, SO much! I just HAD<n>to say
that loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So many people came out to my concert,<n>and it's
all thanks to you! Hehe, it's like<n>a dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mentioned before that as an Umadol, I<n>want to
make this birthday concert the<n>best present ever
to all my fans who<n>support me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But it really feels like I'm the one who'sreceiving the greatest gift. Getting to doa show like this makes me the happiestUmadol in the world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Can't dawdle, though. Time to return my<n>
gratitude in full! Falco, locking iiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll make this the beeeest birthday<n>concert ever!
Let me show you what the<n>world's future top
Umadol can really do!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to keep your eyes on me from<n>the VIP
seats! I'm planning on shining<n>even brighter than
the stars!
